en.value: -     Pre and post intervention KAP survey-     Formation of   32 water and sanitation users groups-     Formation of 12 child health clubs at school-     Formation of 16 youth clubs-     18 events of 2 days WASH awareness training of students, teachers and SMC-     3 events of 1 days sensitization workshop on WASH for representatives from WASH action committees and political party leaders- 3 events of 2 days training on WASH for -     Construction and rehabilitation of 6 small drinking water supply systems and 6 spring protection work in coordination and collaboration with DDC, VDC, line agencies and I/NGO’s-     3 events of water quality orientation and testing-     3 events of demonstration of water filter3 events of demonstration of SODIS method-     18 events of Competition on sanitation at school-     32 events of campaigns, rallies and mass meeting on WASH-     32 events of Demonstration on hand washing to community members-     1000Pcs. of IEC materials publication and documentation3 events of Exposure -     visit for community representatives and political leaders-     54 Rewards and recognition for students-     1100 WASH sticker preparation-     32 CLTS triggering-     External materials support for 800 ultra poor households for toilet construction-     3 Workshop to develop WASH community action plan32 events of training on improved cooking stoves (ICS)

en.full: Improving water security and sanitation amongst marginalized communities in selected districts of Nepal
